## Detailed Findings

### 1. Test Collection — ✅ CLEAN
```
4397 tests collected in 36s
```
**Zero collection errors.** The "4 errors" claim is false. Collection warnings are only Pydantic v2 deprecation notices.

### 2. Print Statements — ✅ MOSTLY CLEAN
| Location | Count | Type |
|---|---|---|
| `src/audiobook_studio/benchmarks/` | ~70 | **CLI tools** — appropriate |
| `src/audiobook_studio/feedback/pr_automation.py` | 1 | **CLI tool** — appropriate |
| Core pipeline/modules | **0** | ✅ Clean |

**Verdict:** No action needed. Benchmarks and PR automation are CLI entry points.

### 3. mock_mode / Placeholder Analysis

#### mock_mode (111 occurrences) — **INTENTIONAL DESIGN**
All pipeline stages support `mock_mode` for **LLM-free testing**:
- `EditForTtsPipeline`, `AnnotateParagraphPipeline`, `AnalyzeStructurePipeline`
- `ExtractPipeline`, `QualityCheckPipeline`, `SynthesizePipeline`
- TTS backends: `KokoroBackend`, `VoxCPM2Backend`
- Feedback: `PromotionGate`, `SyntheticCritic`, `BootstrapFewShot`

**This is a feature, not debt.** Enables fast unit tests without API keys.

#### Real Placeholders (~30) — **ACTUAL DEBT**

| File | Lines | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `audio_finalize.py` | 264, 271 | Fade-out duration placeholder |
| `translate.py` | 254 | Translation fallback placeholder |
| `constitutional_rules.py` | 23, 37 | "Placeholder implementation" |
| `voxcpm2_backend.py` | 116, 160, 215, 240, 245 | Model loading, pitch/time stretch stubs |
| `kokoro_backend.py` | 231 | Pitch shift placeholder |
| `multilingual_dubbing.py` | 235-274 | Character/emotion placeholder system (functional) |
| `collector.py` | 59 | Padding placeholder |
| **API endpoints** | ~20 | `collab.py`, `tts_voices.py`, `auto_run.py`, `websocket.py`, `publish.py` — "not yet implemented" |

**Action Items:**
- [ ] `voxcpm2_backend.py` — Implement real model loading (5 stubs)
- [ ] `audio_finalize.py` — Resolve fade-out duration (2 comments)
- [ ] `constitutional_rules.py` — Implement or remove (2 items)
- [ ] API stubs — Decide: implement or mark as `@deprecated`

## Recommendations

1. **Immediate:** Fix test import failures (`test_websocket.py`, `test_voxcpm2_backend.py`, `test_voice_anchor.py`) — this alone will jump coverage to ~55%
2. **Week 1:** Implement VoxCPM2 backend + Voice Anchor + DNSMOS/ASR stubs
